channel.title: Claude on See Hiong's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Claude on See Hiong's Blog

item.title: AI-Powered Design with Penpot and Claude Code in Kubernetes
item.description: Deploying self-hosted Penpot in a Talos Kubernetes cluster, wiring it to Claude Code via penpot-mcp, and using AI to redesign a PDF merging utility — all without leaving the terminal.
